questions.question: Explain the space-time tradeoff between standard and compressed tries.
keyPoints: Standard tries: Faster operations but higher space usage
Compressed tries: Reduced space through path merging
Search times remain O(m) in both

questions.question: Construct a suffix trie for the string 'BANANA' and show how it supports substring search.
keyPoints: Include all suffixes: BANANA, ANANA, NANA, ANA, NA, A
Highlight shared prefixes in tree structure
